# 404_@林达

> 404_@林达 的个人项目主页，记录前端学习、项目实践、资源雷达、开发者工具、数据可视化和全栈练习。

Main site: https://linsk27.github.io/
GitHub profile: https://github.com/linsk27
Project hub: https://linsk27.github.io/projects/
GitHub projects and star guide: https://linsk27.github.io/github/
About page: https://linsk27.github.io/about/

## Core projects

- Dev Cockpit: local resource radar dashboard for collecting GitHub repositories, demos, tools, tutorials, AI coding resources, category filters, value scores, resource cards, and nebula visualization. Project page: https://linsk27.github.io/projects/dev-cockpit/ Repository: https://github.com/linsk27/local-dev-cockpit
- ProofPR: GitHub Action and CLI for pull request evidence scanning, PR triage, dependency risk, workflow permission checks, secrets detection, MCP security, and maintainer review guidance. Project page: https://linsk27.github.io/projects/proofpr/ Repository: https://github.com/linsk27/proof-pr
- skills-manage: Tauri, React and TypeScript desktop app for managing AI coding agent skills across Claude Code, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more than 20 platforms. Project page: https://linsk27.github.io/projects/skills-manage/ Repository: https://github.com/linsk27/skills-manage Download: https://github.com/iamzhihuix/skills-manage/releases/latest
- AI-Vue3-python-flask-Blog: Vue 3, Flask, MySQL and AI blog system for full-stack practice, course design, graduation project, and secondary development. Project page: https://linsk27.github.io/projects/ai-vue-flask-blog/ Repository: https://github.com/linsk27/AI-Vue3-python-flask-Blog Demo: https://ai-vue3-python-flask-blog.vercel.app/
- AI-v0.dev-: Next.js and TypeScript prototype for AI learning dashboards, v0.dev UI experiments, product interface design, progress tracking, and project cards. Project page: https://linsk27.github.io/projects/ai-v0-dev/ Repository: https://github.com/linsk27/AI-v0.dev-
- Vue-blog: Vue blog front-end project with article pages, AI center, and data analysis dashboard screens. Project page: https://linsk27.github.io/projects/vue-blog/ Repository: https://github.com/linsk27/Vue-blog Demo: https://vue-blog-smoky.vercel.app/
- echarts-learn: Vue, Nuxt and ECharts data visualization dashboard practice for bar charts, radar charts, relation graphs, ring charts, word cloud, and dashboard UI. Project page: https://linsk27.github.io/projects/echarts-learn/ Repository: https://github.com/linsk27/echarts-learn
- bilibili-nuxt3: Nuxt 3, Vue, TypeScript and Vant mobile project practice for SSR, SEO, channel navigation, video lists, detail pages, and mobile UI structure. Project page: https://linsk27.github.io/projects/bilibili-nuxt3/ Repository: https://github.com/linsk27/bilibili-nuxt3
- feidu: Nuxt 3, Vue, Tailwind CSS and ECharts smart community dashboard for community management, security monitoring, CIM platform, energy monitoring, and energy analysis. Project page: https://linsk27.github.io/projects/feidu/ Repository: https://github.com/linsk27/feidu Demo: https://feidu-murex.vercel.app

## Topics

Vue, TypeScript, JavaScript, React, Next.js, Nuxt, Node.js, Vite, Electron, Tauri, GitHub Actions, AI Coding, Agent Skills, AI coding agent skills manager, developer tools, resource radar, GitHub resource manager, pull request review automation, Flask, Python, MySQL, ECharts, full-stack projects, AI UI prototype, learning dashboard, Vue blog, smart community dashboard, security monitoring dashboard, energy monitoring dashboard, CIM platform UI.
